subtitle: 按研究领域浏览 Best Paper / Best Student Paper 获奖论文深读

processing_policy.writing: Paper2Html academic blog; Socratic question→guidance→answer→takeaway; figures are evidence, not decoration
processing_policy.figures: High-resolution local PNG extracted from paper PDF, supplementary PDF, or official project/home pages
processing_policy.formula_check: No ASCII control chars, no Math input error literal, balanced $$, local image paths verified

papers.title: Efficiently Reconstructing Dynamic Scenes One D4RT at a Time
papers.authors: Chuhan Zhang; Guillaume Le Moing; Skanda Koppula; Ignacio Rocco; Liliane Momeni; Junyu Xie; Shuyang Sun; Rahul Sukthankar; Joëlle K Barral; Raia Hadsell; Zoubin Ghahramani; Andrew Zisserman; Junlin Zhang; Mehdi S. M. Sajjadi
papers.blurb: 用统一 query decoder 把 4D tracking、depth、pose、all-pixels reconstruction 接到同一个 feedforward Transformer。
papers.tags: Best Paper 3D Geometry D4RT dynamic scene reconstruction tracking

papers.title: SAM 3D: 3Dfy Anything in Images
papers.authors: SAM 3D Team; Jianing Yang; Georgia Gkioxari; Anushka Sagar; Aohan Lin; Bowen Song; Bowen Zhang; Fu-Jen Chu; Hao Tang; Jiawei Liu; Jitendra Malik; Kevin J Liang; Matt Feiszli; Michelle Guo; Pierre Gleize; Piotr Dollár; Alexander Sax; Thibaut Hardin; Weiyao Wang; Xiang Li; Xiaodong Wang; Xingyu Chen; Ziqi Ma
papers.blurb: 从单张自然图像恢复物体 geometry、texture 与 layout，通过 model/human-in-the-loop 数据引擎做真实图像对齐。
papers.tags: Honorable 3D Geometry SAM 3D reconstruction texture layout

papers.title: NitroGen: An Open Foundation Model for Generalist Gaming Agents
papers.authors: Loïc Magne; Anas Awadalla; Guanzhi Wang; Yinzhen Xu; Joshua Belofsky; Fengyuan Hu; Joohwan Kim; Ludwig Schmidt; Georgia Gkioxari; Jan Kautz; Yisong Yue; Yejin Choi; Yuke Zhu; Linxi Jim Fan
papers.blurb: 从公开视频中恢复 action labels，训练跨商业游戏的 vision-action foundation policy。
papers.tags: Honorable Embodied AI NitroGen gaming agents video action foundation model

papers.title: Native and Compact Structured Latents for 3D Generation
papers.authors: Jianfeng Xiang; Xiaoxue Chen; Sicheng Xu; Ruicheng Wang; Zelong Lv; Yu Deng; Hongyuan Zhu; Yue Dong; Hao Zhao; Nicholas Jing Yuan; Jiaolong Yang
papers.missing_info: 训练总时长、steps/epochs、完整 LR schedule、采样步数等已标注论文未说明
papers.blurb: 用 O-Voxel 保留复杂拓扑与 PBR 材质，再用 SC-VAE 压成 compact SLat，支撑约 4B flow-matching 3D 生成模型。
papers.tags: Student 3D Geometry Native O-Voxel structured latents PBR flow

papers.title: ChordEdit: One-Step Low-Energy Transport for Image Editing
papers.authors: Liangsi Lu; Xuhang Chen; Minzhe Guo; Shichu Li; Jingchao Wang; Yang Shi
papers.notes: ChordEdit deep-dive page with PDF/Supp/project figures and MathJax formula preflight.
papers.topic: Image Editing · Transport / One-step T2I Editing
papers.blurb: 用低能量 Chord Control Field 替代 naive drift difference，实现 training-free、inversion-free 的 one-step 实时图像编辑。
papers.tags: Student Honorable Editing ChordEdit image editing transport

papers.title: B³-Seg: Camera-Free, Training-Free 3DGS Segmentation via Analytic EIG and Beta–Bernoulli Bayesian Updates
papers.blurb: 把 training-free / camera-free 的 3DGS 分割重写成 Beta–Bernoulli 贝叶斯更新 + 解析 EIG 主动视角选择，并证明贪心选视角有 (1−1/e) 近似最优界。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate 3DGS Segmentation Bayesian EIG submodular training-free camera-free
papers.authors: Hiromichi Kamata; Samuel Arthur Munro; Fuminori Homma

papers.title: 4D-RGPT: Toward Region-level 4D Understanding via Perceptual Distillation
papers.blurb: 用 Perceptual 4D Distillation 把冻结 4D 专家的潜在 + 显式表征蒸馏进 MLLM 主干，配时间戳编码与区域级提示，做深度感知的 4D 视频问答；并提出 R4D-Bench。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate Multimodal LLM 4D VQA distillation NVIDIA region-level depth temporal R4D-Bench
papers.authors: Chiao-An Yang; Ryo Hachiuma; Sifei Liu; Subhashree Radhakrishnan; Raymond A. Yeh; Yu-Chiang Frank Wang; Min-Hung Chen

papers.title: tttLRM: Test-Time Training for Long Context and Autoregressive 3D Reconstruction
papers.blurb: 把跨视角记忆从注意力 KV cache 换成被梯度更新的 fast weights（TTT/LaCT），实现线性复杂度、长上下文（64 视角）、高分辨率且自回归流式的前馈 3DGS 重建。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate 3D Reconstruction LRM test-time training TTT LaCT fast weights long context autoregressive Adobe
papers.authors: Chen Wang; Hao Tan; Wang Yifan; Zhiqin Chen; Yuheng Liu; Kalyan Sunkavalli; Sai Bi; Lingjie Liu; Yiwei Hu

papers.title: MacTok: Robust Continuous Tokenization for Image Generation
papers.blurb: 用随机 + DINO 语义掩码重建和全局/局部表征对齐，防止少 token 连续 tokenizer 的 posterior collapse，64/128 token 即取得 ImageNet SOTA gFID。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate Image Tokenizer generation posterior collapse masking DINO alignment 1D continuous VAE Fudan
papers.authors: Guanghao Li; Yuxiang Yan; Xin Gao; Hengyu Zeng; Jiaoyang Ruan; Junpeng Ma; Haoyu Albert Wang; Jian Pu

papers.title: A Frame is Worth One Token: Efficient Generative World Modeling with Delta Tokens
papers.blurb: 用 Best-of-Many 单前向出多样未来、再把相邻帧 VFM 特征差压成一个 delta token（视频 3D→1D，1024× 压缩），让生成式世界模型既多样又便宜。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate world model video Best-of-Many delta token VFM feature space mode averaging Amazon generative
papers.authors: Tommie Kerssies; Gabriele Berton; Ju He; Qihang Yu; Wufei Ma; Daan de Geus; Gijs Dubbelman; Liang-Chieh Chen

papers.title: MSPT: Efficient Large-Scale Physical Modeling via Parallelized Multi-Scale Attention
papers.blurb: 用 ball-tree 切空间连续 patch、patch 内做局部注意力 + 对池化 supernode 做全局注意力，复杂度线性项主导，单卡扩展到百万点物理仿真并取得 SOTA 精度。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate Neural PDE physics multi-scale attention ball tree supernode pooling efficient transformer million points Amsterdam
papers.authors: Pedro M. P. Curvo; Jan-Willem van de Meent; Maksim Zhdanov

papers.title: SAM 3D Body: Robust Full-Body Human Mesh Recovery
papers.blurb: 共享编码器 + 身体/手部双解码器拆解优化冲突，用手腕+肘部 re-prompt 缝回一致全身；配 VLM 数据引擎与多阶段网格拟合标注（700 万图），成为首个身手两端同时立住的单模型。
papers.tags: Top Paper candidate Human Mesh Recovery pose estimation promptable two-way decoder Momentum Human Rig data engine Meta MHR
papers.authors: Xitong Yang; Devansh Kukreja; Don Pinkus; Anushka Sagar; Taosha Fan; Jinhyung Park; Soyong Shin; Jinkun Cao; Jiawei Liu; Nicolas Ugrinovic; Matt Feiszli; Jitendra Malik; Piotr Dollar; Kris Kitani

papers.title: LLaDA-MedV: Exploring Large Language Diffusion Models for Biomedical Image Understanding
papers.topic: Medical AI · 掩码扩散语言 VLM
papers.blurb: 首个生物医学掩码扩散 VLM：从固定长度全掩码画布迭代填空，长度成为输入超参而非 EOS 早停；开放式对话领先 ARM、闭合式 VQA 三连 SOTA（84.93/92.31/95.15）。
papers.tags: Medical Medical AI biomedical VLM masked diffusion LLaDA visual instruction tuning VQA length control closed-form SOTA ASU
papers.authors: Xuanzhao Dong; Wenhui Zhu; Xiwen Chen; Zhipeng Wang; Peijie Qiu; Shao Tang; Xin Li; Yalin Wang
papers.missing_info: 训练总时长、steps/epochs、完整 LR schedule 等已标注论文未说明

papers.title: VoxTell: Free-Text Promptable Universal 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.topic: Medical AI · 文本提示 3D 医学分割 / 多尺度视觉-语言融合
papers.blurb: 把文本融合从 MaskFormer 的“末端一次点积”改成“每个解码尺度都融一次 + 深监督”：62K+ CT/MRI/PET、1087 概念上训练，11 个未见数据集零样本平均 Dice 70.85（次优 SAT 51.23），真实放射报告整句提示下 50.2 而 SAT 仅 0.0。
papers.tags: Medical Medical AI text-promptable segmentation 3D CT MRI PET vision-language fusion multi-scale deep supervision UNet ResEncL Qwen3-Embedding open-vocabulary zero-shot DKFZ nnU-Net
papers.authors: Maximilian Rokuss; Moritz Langenberg; Yannick Kirchhoff; Fabian Isensee; Benjamin Hamm; Constantin Ulrich; Sebastian Regnery; Lukas Bauer; Efthimios Katsigiannopulos; Tobias Norajitra; Klaus Maier-Hein
papers.missing_info: 总训练 steps/epochs、完整 LR schedule、表 1/表 3 个别数据集精确名置于附录（正文按模态行+点名数值核对）
